```{r plot-pathways-from-global-overview-meth_clusters-all, fig.width=24, fig.height=16, fig.align='center', fig.keep='last', results='asis' }
    scale_values= c(head(scale_values, n=length(which(fc_values>0))), tail(scale_values, n=length(which(fc_values<0))))
    fc_values = (fc_values + scale_values)
    if (!gp_comp%in% names(path_fc_delta)){
      path_fc_delta[[gp_comp]] = data.frame(Hugo_Symbol = names(delta_values),
                                            Delta_value = delta_values,
                                            Log2_FC = sapply(names(delta_values), function(x) fc_values[x]))
    }
    message(paste("### Pathway Analysis of Genes from Differential Analyses in", ifelse(gene_type=="promoter", "Gene Promoter", "All Gene"), "Regions -", substring(gp_comp, 1,2), "vs", substring(gp_comp, 3,4), ".  \n\n", sep=" "))
    num_genes[[paste(path_type, gp_comp, sep="_")]] = length(delta_values)
    perform.pathway.analysis (genes = unique(diff_genes$UCSC_RefGene_Name),
                              delta.values = delta_values,
                              fc.values = fc_values,
                              pathway.type = path_type,
                              subgroup.comp = c(group_comparisons[[gp_comp]][1], group_comparisons[[gp_comp]][2]),
                              gene.type = gene_type,
                              use.mean = use_mean,
                              gene.set.filter = gene_set_filter,
                              min.set = ifelse(path_type=="Hallmark", 30, ifelse(length(grep("Nabet", path_type))>0, 2, 100)), 
                              results.dir = paste0(RData_results_dir, "Plots/Meth_Clust_Diff_Analysis/Diff_Analysis_DeltaBeta", delta_beta, "_Padj", padj, "/Pathway_Analysis/Promoter_Gene_Regions/", ifelse(use_mean, "Mean", "Median"), "_Values/",
                                                  "No_Filter_", seed.value, "/")
                              )
    # store the edited differentially methylated probe information into one list
    if (!gp_comp%in%names(all_diff_genes)){
      all_diff_genes[[gp_comp]] = diff_genes
    }
  }
}

```



```{r look-at-cluster-methylation-across-pathways-per-cluster, fig.width = 25, fig.height= 30 }
gene_set1 = paste0(working_dir, "Sample_Sheets/Pathway_Gene_Sets/h.all.v2024.1.Hs.symbols.gmt")
hallmark_paths = read.gmt(gene_set1)
gene_set2 = paste0(working_dir, "Sample_Sheets/Pathway_Gene_Sets/c2.all.v2024.1.Hs.symbols.gmt")
c2_paths = read.gmt(gene_set2)
full_paths = rbind(hallmark_paths, c2_paths)
full_paths %<>% dplyr::mutate(Cluster_gene = sapply(gene, function(x) ifelse(x%in%genes_in_clust, "TRUE", "FALSE")),
                              T1T2 = rep("", nrow(full_paths)),
                              T1T3 = rep("", nrow(full_paths)),
                              T1T4 = rep("", nrow(full_paths)),
                              T2T3 = rep("", nrow(full_paths)),
                              T2T4 = rep("", nrow(full_paths)),
                              T3T4 = rep("", nrow(full_paths)))
path_genes = list()
min_path = list()
analysis_of_choice = paste0(ifelse(use_mean, "Mean", "Median"), "_Values/No_Filter_", seed.value , "/")
for (gp in names(group_comparisons)) {
  gp_hall_data = as.data.frame(fread(paste0(RData_results_dir, "Plots/Meth_Clust_Diff_Analysis/Diff_Analysis_DeltaBeta", delta_beta, "_Padj", padj, "/Pathway_Analysis/Promoter_Gene_Regions/", analysis_of_choice, "Fielding_-_Lung_All_Seq_",
                                            group_comparisons[[gp]][1], "_vs_", group_comparisons[[gp]][2], ifelse(limma_analysis, "_limma", ""), ifelse(use_mean, "_mean", "_median"),
                                            "_no_filter", "_Promoter_Regions_Hallmark_GSEA.csv")))
  gp_c2_data = as.data.frame(fread(paste0(RData_results_dir, "Plots/Meth_Clust_Diff_Analysis/Diff_Analysis_DeltaBeta", delta_beta, "_Padj", padj, "/Pathway_Analysis/Promoter_Gene_Regions/", analysis_of_choice, "Fielding_-_Lung_All_Seq_",
                                          group_comparisons[[gp]][1], "_vs_", group_comparisons[[gp]][2], ifelse(limma_analysis, "_limma", ""), ifelse(use_mean, "_mean", "_median"),
                                          "_no_filter", "_Promoter_Regions_C2_GSEA.csv")))
  gp_data = rbind(gp_hall_data, gp_c2_data)
  for (path in unique(full_paths$term)){
    min_pval = 1
    path_data = dplyr::filter(gp_data, ID==path)
    if (nrow(path_data)>0){
      min_path[[path]] = ifelse(min_pval>path_data$p.adjust, gp, min_path[[path]])
      min_pval = ifelse(min_pval>path_data$p.adjust, path_data$p.adjust, min_pval)
      p_genes = unlist(strsplit(path_data$core_enrichment[which(path_data$ID==path)], "/"))
      if (length(p_genes)>0){
        full_paths[which(full_paths$term==path&full_paths$gene%in%p_genes),gp] = "TRUE"
      }
    }
  }
}
full_paths %<>% dplyr::mutate(T1T2 = sapply(T1T2, function(x) ifelse(x=="TRUE", x, "FALSE")),
                              T1T3 = sapply(T1T3, function(x) ifelse(x=="TRUE", x, "FALSE")),
                              T1T4 = sapply(T1T4, function(x) ifelse(x=="TRUE", x, "FALSE")),
                              T2T3 = sapply(T2T3, function(x) ifelse(x=="TRUE", x, "FALSE")),
                              T2T4 = sapply(T2T4, function(x) ifelse(x=="TRUE", x, "FALSE")),
                              T3T4 = sapply(T3T4, function(x) ifelse(x=="TRUE", x, "FALSE")))
full_paths %<>% dplyr::mutate(Num_comp = apply(full_paths, 1, function(x) length(which(x[grep("T", colnames(full_paths), ignore.case = FALSE)]=="TRUE"))))
get_probes = function(x, gene){
  probes = x$Probe_name[which(x$UCSC_RefGene_Name==gene)]
  return(probes)
}
path_avg = NULL
path_rna_avg = NULL
immune_pways = c("HALLMARK_ALLOGRAFT_REJECTION", "HALLMARK_INTERFERON_GAMMA_RESPONSE", "HALLMARK_INTERFERON_ALPHA_RESPONSE", "ZHENG_BOUND_BY_FOXP3", "MARSON_BOUND_BY_FOXP3_UNSTIMULATED", "MARSON_BOUND_BY_FOXP3_STIMULATED", "REACTOME_ADAPTIVE_IMMUNE_SYSTEM",
                 "HALLMARK_IL2_STAT5_SIGNALING", "HALLMARK_TNFA_SIGNALING_VIA_NFKB", "FULCHER_INFLAMMATORY_RESPONSE_LECTIN_VS_LPS_DN", "MATSUDA_NATURAL_KILLER_DIFFERENTIATION", "REACTOME_CYTOKINE_SIGNALING_IN_IMMUNE_SYSTEM")
immune_pway_names = c("ALLOGRAFT_REJECTION", "INTERFERON_GAMMA_RESPONSE", "INTERFERON_ALPHA_RESPONSE", "FOXP3_TARGETS", "FOXP3_TARGETS_UNSTIMULATED", "FOXP3_TARGETS_STIMULATED", "ADAPTIVE_IMMUNE_SYSTEM",
                 "IL2_STAT5_SIGNALING", "TNFA_SIGNALING_VIA_NFKB", "INFLAMMATORY_RESPONSE", "NATURAL_KILLER_DIFFERENTIATION", "CYTOKINE_SIGNALING_IN_IMMUNE_SYSTEM")
stroma_pways = c("NABA_MATRISOME", "REACTOME_EXTRACELLULAR_MATRIX_ORGANIZATION", "DURAND_STROMA_S_UP")
stroma_pway_names = c("MATRISOME", "EXTRACELLULAR_MATRIX_ORGANIZATION", "STROMA")
tumour_pways = c("BENPORATH_ES_WITH_H3K27ME3", "MEISSNER_BRAIN_HCP_WITH_H3K4ME3_AND_H3K27ME3", "BENPORATH_PRC2_TARGETS","HALLMARK_EPITHELIAL_MESENCHYMAL_TRANSITION", "WONG_ADULT_TISSUE_STEM_MODULE", "NUYTTEN_EZH2_TARGETS_UP",
                 "REACTOME_CELL_CYCLE", "BENPORATH_MYC_MAX_TARGETS", "DANG_BOUND_BY_MYC",  "HALLMARK_MYC_TARGETS_V1", "BENPORATH_NANOG_TARGETS", "BENPORATH_SOX2_TARGETS")
tumour_pway_names = c("H3K27ME3", "H3K4ME3_AND_H3K27ME3", "PRC2_TARGETS", "EMT", "STEM_CELLS", "EZH2_TARGETS",
                      "CELL_CYCLE", "MYC_MAX_TARGETS", "BOUND_BY_MYC", "MYC_TARGETS", "NANOG_TARGETS", "SOX2_TARGETS")
pathways_of_interest = c(immune_pways, stroma_pways, tumour_pways)
pathway_names = c(immune_pway_names, stroma_pway_names, tumour_pway_names)
full_int_paths = dplyr::filter(full_paths, term %in% pathways_of_interest) %>% dplyr::mutate(term = sapply(term, function(x) pathway_names[which(pathways_of_interest==x)]))
RNASeq_TMM = as.data.frame(fread(paste0(working_dir, "Results/RNA_genes_of_interest_full_48Samp.tsv")))
RNASeq_TMM = RNASeq_TMM[, c(1,2,which(colnames(RNASeq_TMM)%in%new_samp_info$Sample_info$Sample_Name))]

M_values = FALSE
for (path in pathway_names){
  path_genes[[path]] = dplyr::filter(full_int_paths, term==path, Num_comp>=1)$gene
  for (gene in path_genes[[path]]){
    # get probes for promoter regions
    gene_probes = unique(unlist(lapply(all_diff_genes, function(x) get_probes(x, gene))))
    if (M_values){
      gene_meth = meth_M_norm[gene_probes,]
    } else {
      gene_meth = meth_norm[gene_probes,]
    }
    if(!is.null(gene_meth)){
      gene_rna = dplyr::filter(RNASeq_TMM, `Associated Gene Name`==gene)
      if (nrow(gene_rna)>1){
        gene_rna = rbind(gene_rna, c(gene_rna$`Gene Name`[1], gene_rna$`Associated Gene Name`[1], apply(gene_rna[, 3:ncol(gene_rna)], 2, max)))
      }
      gene_rna_avg = data.frame(Pathway = path,
                                Gene = gene,
                                Group1 = median(log2(as.numeric(dplyr::select(gene_rna[nrow(gene_rna),], new_samp_info$Sample_info$Sample_Name[intersect(which(new_samp_info$Sample_info$Meth_Cluster=="Group1"), which(new_samp_info$Sample_info$Sample_Name%in%colnames(RNASeq_TMM)))]))+1)), 
                                Group2 = median(log2(as.numeric(dplyr::select(gene_rna[nrow(gene_rna),], new_samp_info$Sample_info$Sample_Name[intersect(which(new_samp_info$Sample_info$Meth_Cluster=="Group2"), which(new_samp_info$Sample_info$Sample_Name%in%colnames(RNASeq_TMM)))]))+1)),
                                Group3 = median(log2(as.numeric(dplyr::select(gene_rna[nrow(gene_rna),], new_samp_info$Sample_info$Sample_Name[intersect(which(new_samp_info$Sample_info$Meth_Cluster=="Group3"), which(new_samp_info$Sample_info$Sample_Name%in%colnames(RNASeq_TMM)))]))+1)),
                                Group4 = median(log2(as.numeric(dplyr::select(gene_rna[nrow(gene_rna),], new_samp_info$Sample_info$Sample_Name[intersect(which(new_samp_info$Sample_info$Meth_Cluster=="Group4"), which(new_samp_info$Sample_info$Sample_Name%in%colnames(RNASeq_TMM)))]))+1)))
      path_rna_avg = rbind(path_rna_avg, gene_rna_avg)
      if (is.matrix(gene_meth)){
        if (nrow(gene_meth)>1){
          gene_avg = data.frame(Pathway = path,
                                Gene = gene,
                                Group1 = median(apply(gene_meth[ ,gsub("_T", "", new_samp_info$Sample_info$Sample_Name[which(new_samp_info$Sample_info$Meth_Cluster=="Group1")])], 1, median)),
                                Group2 = median(apply(gene_meth[ ,gsub("_T", "", new_samp_info$Sample_info$Sample_Name[which(new_samp_info$Sample_info$Meth_Cluster=="Group2")])], 1, median)),
                                Group3 = median(apply(gene_meth[ ,gsub("_T", "", new_samp_info$Sample_info$Sample_Name[which(new_samp_info$Sample_info$Meth_Cluster=="Group3")])], 1, median)),
                                Group4 = median(apply(gene_meth[ ,gsub("_T", "", new_samp_info$Sample_info$Sample_Name[which(new_samp_info$Sample_info$Meth_Cluster=="Group4")])], 1, median)))
          path_avg = rbind(path_avg, gene_avg)
        }
      } else if (is.vector(gene_meth)) {
        gene_avg = data.frame(Pathway = path,
                              Gene = gene,
                              Group1 = median(gene_meth[gsub("_T", "", new_samp_info$Sample_info$Sample_Name[which(new_samp_info$Sample_info$Meth_Cluster=="Group1")])]),
                              Group2 = median(gene_meth[gsub("_T", "", new_samp_info$Sample_info$Sample_Name[which(new_samp_info$Sample_info$Meth_Cluster=="Group2")])]),
                              Group3 = median(gene_meth[gsub("_T", "", new_samp_info$Sample_info$Sample_Name[which(new_samp_info$Sample_info$Meth_Cluster=="Group3")])]),
                              Group4 = median(gene_meth[gsub("_T", "", new_samp_info$Sample_info$Sample_Name[which(new_samp_info$Sample_info$Meth_Cluster=="Group4")])]))
        path_avg = rbind(path_avg, gene_avg)
      }
    }
  }
}
path_types = unique(path_avg$Pathway)
path_rna_avg %<>% dplyr::filter(!is.na(Group1))

```


```{r plot-cluster-methylation-across-pathways-per-cluster-boxplots, fig.width = 25, fig.height= 30 }
sep_path = list()
rna_path = list()
meth_paths_df = NULL
rna_paths_df = NULL
for (path_t in path_types){
  h_path_num = nrow(dplyr::filter(full_int_paths, term==path_t))
  p_path_num = nrow(dplyr::filter(path_avg, Pathway==path_t))
  r_path_num = nrow(dplyr::filter(path_rna_avg, Pathway==path_t))
  plot_data = melt(dplyr::filter(path_avg, Pathway==path_t), variable.name = "Meth_Cluster", value.name="Median_Beta")
  meth_paths_df = rbind(meth_paths_df,
                        data.frame(Pathway = unique(plot_data$Pathway),
                                   Group1_Path_Med = median(plot_data$Median_Beta[which(plot_data$Meth_Cluster=="Group1")]),
                                   Group2_Path_Med = median(plot_data$Median_Beta[which(plot_data$Meth_Cluster=="Group2")]),
                                   Group3_Path_Med = median(plot_data$Median_Beta[which(plot_data$Meth_Cluster=="Group3")]),
                                   Group4_Path_Med = median(plot_data$Median_Beta[which(plot_data$Meth_Cluster=="Group4")])))
  plot_rna_data = melt(dplyr::filter(path_rna_avg, Pathway==path_t), variable.name = "Meth_Cluster", value.name="Median_Log2+1")
  rna_paths_df = rbind(rna_paths_df,
                       data.frame(Pathway = unique(plot_rna_data$Pathway),
                                  Group1_Path_Med = median(plot_rna_data$`Median_Log2+1`[which(plot_rna_data$Meth_Cluster=="Group1")]),
                                  Group2_Path_Med = median(plot_rna_data$`Median_Log2+1`[which(plot_rna_data$Meth_Cluster=="Group2")]),
                                  Group3_Path_Med = median(plot_rna_data$`Median_Log2+1`[which(plot_rna_data$Meth_Cluster=="Group3")]),
                                  Group4_Path_Med = median(plot_rna_data$`Median_Log2+1`[which(plot_rna_data$Meth_Cluster=="Group4")])))
}

```

```{r pathways-heatmap, fig.height=14, fig.width=15}
path_hmaps = list()
path_mat = list()
for (p_hmap in c("Meth", "RNA")){
  if (p_hmap == "Meth") {
    # create zscores for the methylation data
    path_mat[[p_hmap]] = as.matrix(meth_paths_df[2:ncol(meth_paths_df)])
    rownames(path_mat[[p_hmap]]) = gsub("_", " ", meth_paths_df$Pathway)
  } else {
    # create zscores for the RNA data
    path_mat[[p_hmap]] = as.matrix(rna_paths_df[2:ncol(rna_paths_df)])
    rownames(path_mat[[p_hmap]]) = gsub("_", " ", rna_paths_df$Pathway)
  }
  colnames(path_mat[[p_hmap]]) = gsub("_Path_Med", "", colnames(path_mat[[p_hmap]]))
  path_mat[[p_hmap]] = t(apply(path_mat[[p_hmap]], 1, function(x) (x-mean(x))/sd(x)))
  path_col = c("lightblue1", "cadetblue3", "black", "tan4", "darkgoldenrod2")
  path_hmaps[[p_hmap]] = grid.grabExpr(draw(Heatmap(path_mat[[p_hmap]],
                                                    col=colorRamp2(c(-2, -1, 0, 1, 2), path_col),
                                                    cluster_rows=FALSE,
                                                    cluster_columns=FALSE,
                                                    column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize=18),
                                                    row_names_side="left",
                                                    row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize=24),
                                                    row_names_gp=gpar(fontsize=20),
                                                    row_names_max_width = unit(15, "cm"),
                                                    row_split = c(rep("Immune", length(immune_pways)), rep("Stroma", length(stroma_pways)), rep("Tumour", length(tumour_pways))),
                                                    row_gap = unit(10, "mm"),
                                                    column_title=paste(gsub(" DNA Methylation", "", study_name), "-", ifelse(p_hmap=="RNA", "RNA", "Methylation"), "Pathway Scores"),
                                                    column_names_centered = TRUE,
                                                    column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=20),
                                                    column_names_rot = 0,
                                                    show_column_names = TRUE,
                                                    heatmap_legend_param = list(title="Z-score",
                                                                                title_gp=gpar(fontsize=18, fontface="bold"),
                                                                                labels_gp=gpar(fontsize=14),
                                                                                legend_height=unit(4,"cm"),
                                                                                grid_width=unit(8,"mm"),
                                                                                just=c("right", "top"))), 
                                            padding = unit(c(1,18,1,10),"mm")))
}
# *************************
# Fig 2 b
# *************************
grid.arrange(path_hmaps$Meth)
grid.arrange(path_hmaps$RNA)

```



```{r create-heatmap-annotations-of-all-clusters, fig.width=20, fig.height=4}
col.annotations = dplyr::select(dplyr::arrange(new_samp_info$Sample_info, Meth_Index), Treatment, Survival_Group, Tumour_Content, Sample_Group, Paper_Regions_M, Meth_Cluster) # Var_ALL_2000_M
rownames(col.annotations) = new_samp_info$Sample_info$Sample_Name
hm.zero = matrix(nrow=0, ncol = nrow(col.annotations))
colnames(hm.zero) = rownames(col.annotations)
anno.cols = list()
left.pad = 15
right.pad = 5
for (col in colnames(col.annotations)){
  anno.cols[[col]] = new_samp_info$colour_cat_border[[col]]
}

ha = HeatmapAnnotation(df = col.annotations,
                       col = anno.cols,
                       annotation_height=unit(10, "mm"),
                       annotation_width=unit(10, "mm"),
                       annotation_name_gp = gpar(cex=0.9),
                       show_legend = FALSE
                       )
clust_hm = Heatmap(hm.zero,
                   name = "All Sample Clusters",
                   cluster_rows=FALSE,
                   cluster_columns=FALSE,
                   row_names_side="left",
                   row_names_gp=gpar(fontsize=6),
                   bottom_annotation=ha,
                   show_column_names = FALSE, #ifelse(length(samp.cat)<=16, TRUE, FALSE),
                   # column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize=samp.font.size),
                   column_split = factor(samp_clust),
                   show_heatmap_legend = FALSE
                   )
clust_grob = grid.grabExpr(draw(clust_hm, padding = unit(c(1,left.pad,1,right.pad),"mm")))
# *************************
# Fig S2
# *************************
plot_grid(clust_grob)

```
  

\newpage  
 
# Examine Methylation of Specific Genes of Interest.  


```{r set-up-gene-data, fig.width=8, fig.height=4, fig.align='center' }
# **********
# for methylation data
# **********
genes_for_gene_info = rbind(genes_of_interest$sclc, genes_of_interest$treatment, genes_of_interest$oncogene, genes_of_interest$immune, genes_of_interest$meth_enzyme, genes_of_interest$parpi, genes_of_interest$special, genes_of_interest$fibroblast2, 
                            genes_of_interest$amp, dplyr::filter(genes_set_data, Hugo_Symbol=="REST"), genes_of_interest$cytolytic, genes_of_interest$apm, genes_of_interest$epithelial, genes_of_interest$mesenchymal, genes_of_interest$extra)
genes_for_gene_info = genes_for_gene_info[!duplicated(genes_for_gene_info),]
if (!is.null(genes_for_gene_info)){
  gene_info = list()
  for (gene in genes_for_gene_info$Hugo_Symbol){
    chr_probe_info = dplyr::filter(Probe_info,
                                   IlmnID %in% gene_Probe_info$IlmnID[which(gene_Probe_info$Hugo_Symbol==gene)])
    if (length(grep(gene, as.character(chr_probe_info$UCSC_RefGene_Name)))>0){
      message(paste("Loading gene information for:", gene))
      gene_info[[gene]] = load.gene.info(chr_probe_info, gene)
    }
  }
}
genes_filtered_1 = filter(genes_for_gene_info, !Hugo_Symbol%in%names(gene_info)) %>%
  mutate(Reason = "No entry in probe information file")

genes_for_gene_info %<>% filter(Hugo_Symbol%in%names(gene_info))

```

\newpage

## Heatmaps Specific Genes of Interest.

In this section heatmaps for the list of genes of interest are created.  The heatmaps are supervised, based on probes ordered by chromosome position and the samples ordered on their tumour copy number classification.  

```{r heatmap-of-gene-probes-by-gene-gp, fig.width=16, fig.height=12, fig.align='center', results='asis' }
# check methylation data has suffix in cluster samples
if(length(grep("_T", colnames(meth_norm)))==0){
  colnames(meth_norm) = paste0(colnames(meth_norm), "_T")
}
RNASeq_TMM = as.data.frame(fread(paste0(working_dir, "Results/RNA_genes_of_interest_full_48Samp.tsv")))
RNASeq_TMM_all = as.data.frame(fread(paste0(working_dir, "Results/RNA_genes_of_interest_full_111Samp.tsv")))
# two transcripts for TAP2 removing transcript with fewer than 5 counts across all SCLC samples
RNASeq_TMM_all = RNASeq_TMM_all[which(!RNASeq_TMM_all$`Gene Name` == "ENSG00000250264"),]
rna_study_data = as.data.frame(fread(paste0(working_dir, "Results/RNA_AllLung_samples_withRNA.tsv")))
rna_study_data = rna_study_data[which(!duplicated(rna_study_data)),]
# remove 2 samples that are duplicated so all donors are unique
rna_study_data %<>% dplyr::filter(!Sample%in%c("4400119", "4400067"))
if(length(grep("_T", colnames(RNASeq_TMM_all)))==0){
  colnames(RNASeq_TMM_all)[3:ncol(RNASeq_TMM_all)] = paste0(colnames(RNASeq_TMM_all)[3:ncol(RNASeq_TMM_all)], "_T")
}
if(length(grep("_T", colnames(RNASeq_TMM)))==0){
  colnames(RNASeq_TMM)[3:ncol(RNASeq_TMM)] = paste0(colnames(RNASeq_TMM)[3:ncol(RNASeq_TMM)], "_T")
}
gene_samp_info = new_samp_info$Sample_info
rna_cluster_data = dplyr::filter(cluster_data, Donor_Label%in%colnames(RNASeq_TMM))
rna_gene_samp_info = gene_samp_info[rna_cluster_data$Donor_Label, ]
rna_gene_samp_info$Sample_Name = factor(rna_gene_samp_info$Sample_Name, levels = rna_gene_samp_info$Sample_Name)
rna_meth_norm = meth_norm[,rna_cluster_data$Donor_Label]
RNASeq_TMM = RNASeq_TMM_all[, c(colnames(RNASeq_TMM_all)[c(1,2)],colnames(rna_meth_norm))]
gene_gp_heatmap = list()
clust.name = "Meth_Cluster"
hm_gene_sets = c("sclc")
gene_samp_info = gene_samp_info[names(new_samp_info$Sample_Clusters[[clust.name]]),]
gene_samp_info$Sample_Name = factor(gene_samp_info$Sample_Name, levels = names(new_samp_info$Sample_Clusters[[clust.name]]))
z_score = FALSE
add_annos = c("Survival_Group", "Tumour_Content") 
for (gene_set in hm_gene_sets){
  gene_set_genes = dplyr::filter(genes_of_interest[[gene_set]], !CHR=="chrX") %>% dplyr::arrange(as.numeric(gsub("chr", "", CHR)))
  if (gene_set == "sclc") {
    gene_set_genes %<>% dplyr::filter(!Hugo_Symbol=="REST")
  }
  gene_gp_heatmap[[gene_set]] = draw.gene.heatmap(meth.data = rna_meth_norm,
                                                  samp.info = rna_gene_samp_info,
                                                  RNA.info = RNASeq_TMM,
                                                  cat.cols = new_samp_info$colour_cat_border,
                                                  gene.info = gene_info[c(gene_set_genes$Hugo_Symbol)],
                                                  gene = ifelse(length(gene_set_genes$Hugo_Symbol)>1, "all", gene_set_genes$Hugo_Symbol),
                                                  meth.sub = clust.name,
                                                  gene.meth.sub = ifelse(!is.null(region_probes), "Paper_Regions_M", "Var_ALL_2000_M"), 
                                                  status = gene_set,
                                                  zscore = z_score,
                                                  add.annos = add_annos)
}
# *************************
# Fig 2 a
# *************************
grid.arrange(gene_gp_heatmap$sclc$heatmap)

```


```{r create-rna-seq-heatmaps }
hm_plots = c("Meth_Cluster")
rna_gene_sets = c("NE", "non-NE")
z_score=TRUE
meth_var_order = FALSE
if (meth_var_order){
  meth_var = ifelse(!is.null(region_probes), "Paper_Regions_M", "Var_ALL_2000_M")
  new_samp_info$Sample_info$Sample_Name = factor(new_samp_info$Sample_info$Sample_Name, levels=names(new_samp_info$Sample_Clusters[[meth_var]]))
  new_samp_info$Sample_info %<>% dplyr::arrange(Sample_Name)
  annotations = data.frame(Histology = new_samp_info$Sample_info$Sample_Group,
                           Sub_Group = new_samp_info$Sample_info[,meth_var],
                           Meth_Cluster = new_samp_info$Sample_info$Meth_Cluster
                           )
  rownames(annotations) = new_samp_info$Sample_info$Sample_Name
  anno.cols = new_samp_info$colour_cat_border[c("Meth_Cluster", "Sample_Group", meth_var)]
  names(anno.cols) = c("Meth_Cluster", "Histology", "Sub_Group")
} else {
  meth_var = "Meth_Cluster"
  annotations = data.frame(Survival = new_samp_info$Sample_info$Survival_Group[order(new_samp_info$Sample_info$Meth_Index)],
                           Histology = new_samp_info$Sample_info$Sample_Group[order(new_samp_info$Sample_info$Meth_Index)],
                           Sub_Group = new_samp_info$Sample_info$Meth_Cluster[order(new_samp_info$Sample_info$Meth_Index)]
                           )
  rownames(annotations) = new_samp_info$Sample_info$Sample_Name[order(new_samp_info$Sample_info$Meth_Index)]
  anno.cols = new_samp_info$colour_cat_border[c("Meth_Cluster", "Sample_Group", "Survival_Group")]
  names(anno.cols) = c("Sub_Group", "Histology", "Survival")
}
annotations = annotations[which(rownames(annotations)%in%colnames(RNASeq_TMM)),]
ha = HeatmapAnnotation(df = annotations,
                       col=anno.cols,
                       show_legend=TRUE,
                       show_annotation_name = TRUE,
                       annotation_name_side = "left",
                       annotation_height=unit(ncol(annotations)*4, "mm"),
                       which = "column",
                       annotation_name_gp = gpar(fontsize=10),
                       annotation_legend_param = list(labels_gp = gpar(fontsize=8),
                                                      title_gp = gpar(fontsize=10, fontface="bold"),
                                                      grid_height=unit(5,"mm"),
                                                      grid_width=unit(5,"mm")),
                       na_col = "#dddddd")
rna_hmaps = list()
rna_seq_data = list()
for (gene_set in rna_gene_sets){
  rna_seq_data[[gene_set]] = dplyr::filter(RNASeq_TMM, `Associated Gene Name`%in%c(genes_of_interest[[gene_set]]$Hugo_Symbol))
  plot_rna_seq = as.data.frame(t(rna_seq_data[[gene_set]][,3:ncol(rna_seq_data[[gene_set]])]))
  colnames(plot_rna_seq) = rna_seq_data[[gene_set]]$`Associated Gene Name`
  if (z_score){
    plot_rna_seq = as.data.frame(apply(plot_rna_seq, 2, function(x) (x-mean(x))/sd(x)))
  } else {
    plot_rna_seq = as.data.frame(apply(plot_rna_seq, 2, function(x) log2(x+1)))
  }
  plot_rna_seq %<>% dplyr::mutate(Sample_Name = rownames(plot_rna_seq))
  plot_data = plot_rna_seq
  for (gene in rna_seq_data[[gene_set]]$`Associated Gene Name`){
    plot_data[which(is.na(plot_data[,gene])),gene] = 0
  }
  sample_names = plot_data$Sample_Name
  plot_data = t(dplyr::select(plot_data, colnames(plot_data)[which(colnames(plot_data)%in%c(genes_of_interest[[gene_set]]$Hugo_Symbol))]))
  colnames(plot_data) = sample_names
  hm_plots = "Meth_Cluster"
  for (hm_plot in hm_plots) {
    hm_hmaps = list()
    hm_plot_data = plot_data[, rownames(annotations)]
    hm_plot_data = hm_plot_data[, which(colnames(hm_plot_data)%in%colnames(rna_seq_data[[gene_set]]))]
    if (z_score){
      hm_colours = c("dodgerblue4", "white", "firebrick") 
    } else {
      hm_colours = c("navy", "darkcyan", "gold")
    }
    if (gene_set=="NE"){
      hm_hmaps[[hm_plot]] = grid.grabExpr(draw(Heatmap(hm_plot_data[, which(colnames(hm_plot_data)%in%colnames(rna_seq_data[[gene_set]]))],
                                                       col=colorRamp2(c(ifelse(z_score, -2, 0), ifelse(z_score, 0, 5), ifelse(z_score, 4, 9)), hm_colours),
                                                       cluster_rows=FALSE, 
                                                       cluster_columns=FALSE,
                                                       row_names_side="left",
                                                       row_names_gp=gpar(fontsize=8),
                                                       column_split = new_samp_info$Sample_Clusters[[hm_plot]][which(names(new_samp_info$Sample_Clusters[[hm_plot]])%in%colnames(rna_seq_data[[gene_set]]))],
                                                       column_title=paste(study_name, "-", "RNASeq for", toupper(gene_set), "genes by", gsub("_", "", hm_plot)),
                                                       column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize=10),
                                                       show_column_names = FALSE,
                                                       top_annotation = ha,
                                                       heatmap_legend_param = list(title=ifelse(z_score, "RNA Z-score", "Log2(exp+1)"),
                                                                                   title_gp=gpar(fontsize=10, fontface="bold"), 
                                                                                   labels_gp=gpar(fontsize=8), 
                                                                                   legend_height=unit(5,"cm"), 
                                                                                   grid_width=unit(5,"mm"),
                                                                                   just=c("right", "top")))))
    } else {
      hm_hmaps[[hm_plot]] = grid.grabExpr(draw(Heatmap(hm_plot_data[, which(colnames(hm_plot_data)%in%colnames(rna_seq_data[[gene_set]]))],
                                                       col=colorRamp2(c(ifelse(z_score, -2, 0), ifelse(z_score, 0, 5), ifelse(z_score, 4, 9)), hm_colours),
                                                       cluster_rows=FALSE, 
                                                       cluster_columns=FALSE,
                                                       row_names_side="left",
                                                       row_names_gp=gpar(fontsize=8),
                                                       column_split = new_samp_info$Sample_Clusters[[hm_plot]][which(names(new_samp_info$Sample_Clusters[[hm_plot]])%in%colnames(rna_seq_data[[gene_set]]))],
                                                       column_title=paste(study_name, "-", "RNASeq for", toupper(gene_set), "genes by", gsub("_", "", hm_plot)),
                                                       column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize=10),
                                                       show_column_names = FALSE,
                                                       heatmap_legend_param = list(title=ifelse(z_score, "RNA Z-score", "Log2(exp+1)"),
                                                                                   title_gp=gpar(fontsize=10, fontface="bold"), 
                                                                                   labels_gp=gpar(fontsize=8), 
                                                                                   legend_height=unit(5,"cm"), 
                                                                                   grid_width=unit(5,"mm"),
                                                                                   just=c("right", "top")))))
    }
  }
  rna_hmaps[[gene_set]] = hm_hmaps
}

```



```{r plo-rna-seq-gene-gps, fig.height=12, fig.width=13 }
for (hm_plot in hm_plots) {
  plot1.rh = 4
  plot1.cent = 183
  plot1.lh = 13
  plot_list = list(rna_hmaps$NE[[hm_plot]], rna_hmaps$`non-NE`[[hm_plot]]) 
  plot_overview = arrangeGrob(grobs = plot_list, layout_matrix = rbind(c(rep(NA, 1), rep(1, 199)),  
                                                                       c(rep(NA, 1), rep(1, 199)), 
                                                                       c(rep(NA, 1), rep(1, 199)),
                                                                       c(rep(NA, 1), rep(1, 199)),
                                                                       c(rep(NA, 1), rep(1, 199)),
                                                                       c(rep(NA, 1), rep(1, 199)),
                                                                       c(rep(NA, 1), rep(1, 199)),
                                                                       c(rep(NA, 1), rep(1, 199)),
                                                                       c(rep(NA, 1), rep(1, 199)),
                                                                       c(rep(NA, 1), rep(1, 199)),
                                                                       c(rep(NA, 1), rep(1, 199)),
                                                                       c(rep(NA, 1), rep(1, 199)),
                                                                       c(rep(NA, 1), rep(1, 199)),
                                                                       c(rep(NA, 1), rep(1, 199)),
                                                                       c(rep(NA, 1), rep(1, 199)),
                                                                       c(rep(NA, 1), rep(1, 199)),
                                                                       c(rep(NA, 1), rep(1, 199)),
                                                                       c(rep(NA, 1), rep(1, 199)),
                                                                       c(rep(NA, plot1.rh), rep(2, plot1.cent), rep(NA, plot1.lh)),
                                                                       c(rep(NA, plot1.rh), rep(2, plot1.cent), rep(NA, plot1.lh)),
                                                                       c(rep(NA, plot1.rh), rep(2, plot1.cent), rep(NA, plot1.lh)),
                                                                       c(rep(NA, plot1.rh), rep(2, plot1.cent), rep(NA, plot1.lh)),
                                                                       c(rep(NA, plot1.rh), rep(2, plot1.cent), rep(NA, plot1.lh)),
                                                                       c(rep(NA, plot1.rh), rep(2, plot1.cent), rep(NA, plot1.lh)),
                                                                       c(rep(NA, plot1.rh), rep(2, plot1.cent), rep(NA, plot1.lh)),
                                                                       c(rep(NA, plot1.rh), rep(2, plot1.cent), rep(NA, plot1.lh)),
                                                                       c(rep(NA, plot1.rh), rep(2, plot1.cent), rep(NA, plot1.lh)),
                                                                       c(rep(NA, plot1.rh), rep(2, plot1.cent), rep(NA, plot1.lh)),
                                                                       c(rep(NA, plot1.rh), rep(2, plot1.cent), rep(NA, plot1.lh)),
                                                                       c(rep(NA, plot1.rh), rep(2, plot1.cent), rep(NA, plot1.lh)),
                                                                       c(rep(NA, plot1.rh), rep(2, plot1.cent), rep(NA, plot1.lh)),
                                                                       c(rep(NA, plot1.rh), rep(2, plot1.cent), rep(NA, plot1.lh)), 
                                                                       c(rep(NA, plot1.rh), rep(2, plot1.cent), rep(NA, plot1.lh))
                                                                       ))
  cat(paste("### Gene Methylation with RNASEQ by Cluster analysis - ", hm_plot, "\n\n", sep=" "))
  # *************************
  # Fig 4 a
  # *************************
  grid.arrange(plot_overview)
  cat(paste("\n\n", "\\pagebreak  ", "\n\n"))
}
```

```{r create-mean-exp-for-nonNE-and-NE-gene-sets, fig.width=12, fig.height=6 }
gene_set_rna_med = NULL
for (gene_set in names(rna_seq_data)) {
  plot_data = data.frame(Sample_Name = colnames(rna_seq_data[[gene_set]])[3:ncol(rna_seq_data[[gene_set]])],
                         RNA_value = sapply(colnames(rna_seq_data[[gene_set]])[3:ncol(rna_seq_data[[gene_set]])], function(x) mean(log2(rna_seq_data[[gene_set]][,x]+1))))
  colnames(plot_data)[which(colnames(plot_data)=="RNA_value")] = gene_set
  if (!is.null(gene_set_rna_med)){
    gene_set_rna_med = merge(gene_set_rna_med, plot_data, by="Sample_Name")
  } else {
    gene_set_rna_med = plot_data
  }
}
gene_set_rna_med %<>% dplyr::mutate(Meth_Cluster = sapply(gene_set_rna_med$Sample_Name, function(x) new_samp_info$Sample_info[,meth_var][which(new_samp_info$Sample_info$Sample_Name==x)]))
gene_set_comp_mean = list()
for (gene_set in names(rna_seq_data)){
  gene_set_rna_med %<>% dplyr::mutate(Gene_Set = gene_set_rna_med[, gene_set])
  gp_levels = unique(new_samp_info$Sample_info$Meth_Cluster)[order(unique(new_samp_info$Sample_info$Meth_Cluster))]
  p = ggplot(data=gene_set_rna_med, aes(x=Meth_Cluster, y=Gene_Set)) + geom_boxplot(aes(fill=Meth_Cluster, color=Meth_Cluster)) + 
      scale_fill_manual(values = new_samp_info$colour_cat[[meth_var]]) + scale_color_manual(values = new_samp_info$colour_cat_border[[meth_var]]) + ylim(0, max(gene_set_rna_med$Gene_Set)+0.05*max(gene_set_rna_med$Gene_Set)) +
      labs(title=paste("Comparison of", gene_set, "Genes by Methylation Cluster"), y="Mean Log2(TMM+1)", x="") + 
      theme(panel.background=element_rect(fill='transparent'),
            axis.line = element_line(color="black"),
            axis.text.x.bottom = element_text(size=10), 
            axis.text = element_text(size=12),
            plot.title = element_text(size=14),
            legend.position = "none") +
      stat_compare_means(aes(group=Meth_Cluster), method=ifelse(length(gp_levels)>2, "kruskal.test", "wilcox.test"), comparisons=NULL)
  my.comparisons = list(c("Group1", "Group2"), c("Group1", "Group3"), c("Group1", "Group4"), c("Group2", "Group3"), c("Group2", "Group4"), c("Group3", "Group4"))
  p = p + stat_compare_means(method="wilcox.test", comparisons = my.comparisons, label.y = c(max(gene_set_rna_med$Gene_Set)+max(gene_set_rna_med$Gene_Set)*0.08, 
                                                                                             max(gene_set_rna_med$Gene_Set)+max(gene_set_rna_med$Gene_Set)*0.16, 
                                                                                             max(gene_set_rna_med$Gene_Set)+max(gene_set_rna_med$Gene_Set)*0.24,
                                                                                             max(gene_set_rna_med$Gene_Set)+max(gene_set_rna_med$Gene_Set)*0.32,
                                                                                             max(gene_set_rna_med$Gene_Set)+max(gene_set_rna_med$Gene_Set)*0.40,
                                                                                             max(gene_set_rna_med$Gene_Set)+max(gene_set_rna_med$Gene_Set)*0.48)) + 
    ylim(0, max(gene_set_rna_med$Gene_Set)+max(gene_set_rna_med$Gene_Set)*0.55)
  p = p + annotate("text", x=2, y=1, label=paste("Groups1&2 vs Group3 p = ", round(wilcox.test(gene_set_rna_med$Gene_Set[which(gene_set_rna_med$Meth_Cluster%in%c("Group1", "Group2"))], gene_set_rna_med$Gene_Set[which(gene_set_rna_med$Meth_Cluster%in%c("Group3"))])$p.value,4)))
  gene_set_comp_mean[[gene_set]] = ggplotGrob(p)   
}
gt = arrangeGrob(grobs=gene_set_comp_mean[c("NE", "non-NE")], ncol=2)
# *************************
# Fig 4 b & c
# *************************
grid.arrange(gt)

```


```{r look-at-meth-rna-relationships-for-genes, fig.height=5, fig.width=10 }
# meth_rna_genes = c(DLL3="treatmant", KDM1A="special", SLFN11="parpi", KDM1A="special", SEZ6="special", CD276="special", TACSTD2="special" )
meth_rna_genes = c(ASCL1="sclc", NEUROD1="sclc", POU2F3="sclc", YAP1="sclc", #KDM1A="special", EZH2="special", SLFN11="parpi",
                   MYC="oncogene", MYCN="oncogene", MYCL1="oncogene", REST="sclc", PLCG2="special" , HMGB3="extra", #DLL3="treatmant", SEZ6="special", CD276="special", TACSTD2="special", 
                   CD274="extra", CTLA4="extra" #, PDCD1="extra", NOTCH1="non-neuro", NOTCH2="non-neuro", NOTCH3="non-neuro"
                   )
# create CNV data for RNASeq samples and genes above
#
#  *************** copy_dir = <directory where copy number details are stored> *********************
CNV_data = NULL
for (donor in gsub("_T", "", colnames(RNASeq_TMM)[grep("_T", colnames(RNASeq_TMM))])){
  sample_study = dplyr::filter(study_data, donorLabel==donor, nchar(ascatAnalysis)>25)
  if (nrow(sample_study)>1 && length(unique(sample_study$testSequencingPlatform))>1){
    sample_study %<>% dplyr::filter(!testSequencingPlatform=="MGIseq2000")
  }
  sample.copy = paste0(copy_dir, donor, "/", gsub("analysis:", "", sample_study$ascatAnalysis), ".copynumber.ascat.tsv")
  if (file.exists(sample.copy)){
    message(paste("ascat copy number exists for", donor))
    sample.ascat = as.data.frame(fread(file=sample.copy))
    sample.gene = as.data.frame(fread(file=paste0(copy_dir, donor, "/", gsub("analysis:", "", sample_study$ascatAnalysis), ".genes.pc.best.cn.txt")))
    sample.gene %<>% dplyr::filter(gene_symbol%in%gsub("MYCL1", "MYCL", names(meth_rna_genes)))
    # message(paste("all genes are", paste(unique(sample.gene$SegmentDescription, collapse="or"))))
    sample.cn = data.frame(Sample_Name = rep(donor, length(names(meth_rna_genes))),
                           Genes = names(meth_rna_genes),
                           CN_values = sapply(gsub("MYCL1", "MYCL", names(meth_rna_genes)), function(x) ifelse(dplyr::filter(sample.gene, gene_symbol==x)$SegmentDescription=="span",
                                                                                                               (dplyr::filter(sample.ascat, chromosome==sample.gene$chromosome[which(sample.gene$gene_symbol==x)]) %>%
                                                                                                                      dplyr::filter(start<sample.gene$gene_start[which(sample.gene$gene_symbol==x)]&end>sample.gene$gene_end[which(sample.gene$gene_symbol==x)]))$median.rawCN,
                                                                                                               (dplyr::filter(sample.ascat, chromosome==sample.gene$chromosome[which(sample.gene$gene_symbol==x)]) %>%
                                                                                                                      dplyr::filter((start>sample.gene$gene_start[which(sample.gene$gene_symbol==x)]&start>sample.gene$gene_end[which(sample.gene$gene_symbol==x)])|
                                                                                                                                      (end>sample.gene$gene_start[which(sample.gene$gene_symbol==x)]&end<sample.gene$gene_end[which(sample.gene$gene_symbol==x)])|
                                                                                                                                      (start>sample.gene$gene_start[which(sample.gene$gene_symbol==x)]&end<sample.gene$gene_end[which(sample.gene$gene_symbol==x)])))$median.rawCN)))
    CNV_data = rbind(CNV_data, sample.cn)
  } else {
    message(paste("No ascat copy number analysis exists for", donor))
  }
}
meth_rna_gene_plots = list()
for (gene in names(meth_rna_genes)){
  meth_rna_gene_plots[[gene]] = draw.meth.rna.box.corr.plot(meth.data=meth_norm,
                                                            samp.info = new_samp_info$Sample_info,
                                                            RNA.info=RNASeq_TMM,
                                                            cnv.data = CNV_data,
                                                            cat.cols = new_samp_info$colour_cat,
                                                            cat.cols.bold = new_samp_info$colour_cat_border,
                                                            gene.info=gene_info,
                                                            genes=gene,
                                                            gene.type=meth_rna_genes[gene],
                                                            violin=FALSE,
                                                            plot.sd=0.1,
                                                            multi.test = "kruskal.test",
                                                            single.test = "wilcox.test",
                                                            all.comp = ifelse(gene%in%c("CD274", "CTLA4"), TRUE, FALSE))
}
meth_rna_gene_sets = c("apm", "cytolytic")
meth_rna_gene_set_plots = list()
for (gene_set in meth_rna_gene_sets){
  gene = genes_of_interest[[gene_set]]$Hugo_Symbol
  meth_rna_gene_set_plots[[gene_set]] = draw.meth.rna.box.corr.plot(meth.data=meth_norm,
                                                                    samp.info = new_samp_info$Sample_info,
                                                                    RNA.info=RNASeq_TMM,
                                                                    cat.cols = new_samp_info$colour_cat,
                                                                    cat.cols.bold = new_samp_info$colour_cat_border,
                                                                    gene.info=gene_info,
                                                                    genes=gene,
                                                                    gene.type=gene_set,
                                                                    violin=FALSE,
                                                                    plot.sd=0.1,
                                                                    multi.test = "kruskal.test",
                                                                    single.test = "wilcox.test",
                                                                    all.comp = TRUE)
}
```


```{r plot-meth-rna-corr-plots-for-paper-ascl1-neurod1-pou2f3-yap1, fig.height=20, fig.width=25}
# *************************
# Fig S3 a, b, c & d
# *************************
grid.arrange(meth_rna_gene_plots$ASCL1$meth$Meth_Promoter_Var, meth_rna_gene_plots$ASCL1$meth$Meth_Body_Var, meth_rna_gene_plots$ASCL1$rna, meth_rna_gene_plots$ASCL1$corr$Meth_Promoter_Var, meth_rna_gene_plots$ASCL1$corr$Meth_Body_Var,
             meth_rna_gene_plots$NEUROD1$meth$Meth_Promoter_Var, meth_rna_gene_plots$NEUROD1$meth$Meth_Body_Var, meth_rna_gene_plots$NEUROD1$rna, meth_rna_gene_plots$NEUROD1$corr$Meth_Promoter_Var, meth_rna_gene_plots$NEUROD1$corr$Meth_Body_Var,
             meth_rna_gene_plots$POU2F3$meth$Meth_Promoter_Var, meth_rna_gene_plots$POU2F3$meth$Meth_Body_Var, meth_rna_gene_plots$POU2F3$rna, meth_rna_gene_plots$POU2F3$corr$Meth_Promoter_Var, meth_rna_gene_plots$POU2F3$corr$Meth_Body_Var,
             meth_rna_gene_plots$YAP1$meth$Meth_Promoter_Var, meth_rna_gene_plots$YAP1$meth$Meth_Body_Var, meth_rna_gene_plots$YAP1$rna, meth_rna_gene_plots$YAP1$corr$Meth_Promoter_Var, meth_rna_gene_plots$YAP1$corr$Meth_Body_Var, nrow=4)

```



```{r plot-rna-plots-for-paper-amp-cytolytic-kdm1a-ezh2-pdl1-ctla4, fig.height=5, fig.width=25}
# *************************
# Fig 3 b, c, d, e & f
# *************************
grid.arrange(gp2_cells_p$`T-cells_CD8`, meth_rna_gene_set_plots$apm$rna, meth_rna_gene_set_plots$cytolytic$rna, meth_rna_gene_plots$CD274$rna, meth_rna_gene_plots$CTLA4$rna, nrow=1) 

```

```{r plot-rna-plots-for-paper-myc-mycn-mycl1-rest-plcg2-hmgb3, fig.height=5, fig.width=10}
# *************************
# Fig 4 d & e
# *************************
grid.arrange(meth_rna_gene_plots$PLCG2$rna, meth_rna_gene_plots$HMGB3$rna, nrow=1)

```


```{r plot-meth-rna-corr-plots-for-paper-myc-mycn-mycl1-rest-plcg2, fig.height=20, fig.width=30}
# grid and plots overview
gg_meth_rna_plots = list(meth_rna_gene_plots$MYC$rna, meth_rna_gene_plots$MYC$meth$Meth_Promoter, meth_rna_gene_plots$MYC$meth$Meth_Body_Var, meth_rna_gene_plots$MYC$corr$Meth_Promoter, meth_rna_gene_plots$MYC$corr$Meth_Body_Var, meth_rna_gene_plots$MYC$corr$CNV_value,
                         meth_rna_gene_plots$MYCN$rna, meth_rna_gene_plots$MYCN$meth$Meth_Promoter_Var, meth_rna_gene_plots$MYCN$meth$Meth_Body_Var, meth_rna_gene_plots$MYCN$corr$Meth_Promoter_Var, meth_rna_gene_plots$MYCN$corr$Meth_Body_Var, meth_rna_gene_plots$MYCN$corr$CNV_value,
                         meth_rna_gene_plots$MYCL1$rna, meth_rna_gene_plots$MYCL1$meth$Meth_Promoter, meth_rna_gene_plots$MYCL1$meth$Meth_Body_Var, meth_rna_gene_plots$MYCL1$corr$Meth_Promoter, meth_rna_gene_plots$MYCL1$corr$Meth_Body_Var, meth_rna_gene_plots$MYCL1$corr$CNV_value,
                         meth_rna_gene_plots$REST$rna, meth_rna_gene_plots$REST$meth$Meth_Promoter_Var, meth_rna_gene_plots$REST$meth$Meth_Body_Var, meth_rna_gene_plots$REST$corr$Meth_Promoter_Var, meth_rna_gene_plots$REST$corr$Meth_Body_Var, meth_rna_gene_plots$REST$corr$CNV_value)
                         # meth_rna_gene_plots$PLCG2$meth$Meth_Promoter_Var, meth_rna_gene_plots$PLCG2$meth$Meth_Body_Var, meth_rna_gene_plots$PLCG2$rna, meth_rna_gene_plots$PLCG2$corr$Meth_Promoter_Var, meth_rna_gene_plots$PLCG2$corr$Meth_Body_Var)
gt = arrangeGrob(grobs=gg_meth_rna_plots, layout_matrix=rbind(c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6),
                                                              c(7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12),
                                                              c(13, 14, 15, 16, 17, 18),
                                                              c(19, 20, 21, 22, 23, 24)))
                                                              # c(21, 22, 23, 24, 25)))
# *************************
# Fig S4 a, b, c & d
# *************************
grid.arrange(gt)

```


```{r compare-sclc-rna-with-other-subtypes, fig.width=12, fig.height=7  }
rna_genes = c(SEZ6="special", CD276="special", TACSTD2="special", DLL3="treatment", SLFN11="parpi")
rna_study_data %<>% dplyr::mutate(Subtype = sapply(Donor, function(x) ifelse(paste0(x, "_T")%in%colnames(RNASeq_TMM), 
                                                                             cluster_data$Meth_Cluster[which(cluster_data$Donor_Label==paste0(x, "_T"))],
                                                                             rna_study_data$`Tumour type`[which(rna_study_data$Donor==x)])))
gp_levels = c("Group1", "Group2", "Group3", "Group4", "Adeno", "NSCLC", "Squamous")
plot_rna_info = dplyr::filter(rna_study_data, Subtype%in%gp_levels) 
plot_rna_info$Subtype = factor(plot_rna_info$Subtype, levels=gp_levels)

violin=FALSE
multi.test = "kruskal.test"
single.test = "wilcox.test"
sub_col = c(new_samp_info$colour_cat_border$Meth_Cluster, sample_border_colours$Sample_Group[c("Adeno", "NSCLC", "Squamous")])
sub_fill = c(new_samp_info$colour_cat$Meth_Cluster, sample_colours$Sample_Group[c("Adeno", "NSCLC", "Squamous")])
exp.grob = list()
for (rna_gene in names(rna_genes)){
  plot_rna_info %<>% dplyr::mutate(RNA_Exp = sapply(Donor, function(x) log2(RNASeq_TMM_all[which(RNASeq_TMM_all$`Associated Gene Name`==rna_gene), paste0(x, "_T")]+1)))
  p.exp = ggplot(data=plot_rna_info, aes(x=Subtype, y=RNA_Exp))
    if (violin){
      p.exp = p.exp + geom_violin(width=0.9, aes(fill=Subtype, color=Subtype)) + 
        stat_summary(fun=mean, geom="point", size=2, color=sub_col[gp_levels])
    } else {
      p.exp = p.exp + geom_boxplot(aes(fill=Subtype, color=Subtype))
    }
    p.exp = p.exp + scale_fill_manual(values = sub_fill) + scale_color_manual(values = sub_col) + ylim(0, max(plot_rna_info$RNA_Exp)+max(plot_rna_info$RNA_Exp)*0.55) + #ylim(0,max(plot_rna_info$RNA_Exp)+max(plot_rna_info$RNA_Exp)*0.1) +
      labs(title=paste0(rna_gene, " Exp per Meth Cluster with other Lung Subtypes."), 
           y=paste(rna_gene, "Expresion\n", "Log2(exp+1)"), 
           x="") + 
      theme(panel.background=element_rect(fill='transparent'),
            axis.line = element_line(color="black"),
            axis.title = element_text(size=18),
            axis.text.x.bottom = element_text(size=14), # hjust=1, size=10, angle=90
            axis.text = element_text(size=12),
            plot.title = element_text(size=18),
            legend.position = "none") 
  my.comparisons = list(c("Group1", "Group2"), c("Group1", "Group3"), c("Group1", "Group4"), c("Group2", "Group3"), c("Group2", "Group4"), c("Group3", "Group4"))
  p.exp = p.exp + stat_compare_means(method="wilcox.test", comparisons = my.comparisons, label.y = c(max(plot_rna_info$RNA_Exp)+max(plot_rna_info$RNA_Exp)*0.08, 
                                                                                             max(plot_rna_info$RNA_Exp)+max(plot_rna_info$RNA_Exp)*0.16, 
                                                                                             max(plot_rna_info$RNA_Exp)+max(plot_rna_info$RNA_Exp)*0.24,
                                                                                             max(plot_rna_info$RNA_Exp)+max(plot_rna_info$RNA_Exp)*0.32,
                                                                                             max(plot_rna_info$RNA_Exp)+max(plot_rna_info$RNA_Exp)*0.40,
                                                                                             max(plot_rna_info$RNA_Exp)+max(plot_rna_info$RNA_Exp)*0.48)) + 
    stat_compare_means(aes(group=Subtype), method=ifelse(length(gp_levels)>2, multi.test, single.test), label="p.format", label.x.npc = 0.7) + 
    stat_compare_means(aes(group=Subtype), method=ifelse(length(gp_levels)>2, multi.test, single.test), label="p.signif", label.x.npc = 0.85)
  if (rna_gene=="SLFN11"){
    p.exp = p.exp + annotate("text", x=2, y=1, label=paste("Groups1&2 vs Groups3&4   p = ", round(wilcox.test(plot_rna_info$RNA_Exp[which(plot_rna_info$Subtype%in%c("Group1", "Group2"))], plot_rna_info$RNA_Exp[which(plot_rna_info$Subtype%in%c("Group3", "Group4"))])$p.value,4)))
    p.exp = p.exp + annotate("text", x=2, y=0.5, label=paste("Groups1&3 vs Groups2&4   p = ", round(wilcox.test(plot_rna_info$RNA_Exp[which(plot_rna_info$Subtype%in%c("Group1", "Group3"))], plot_rna_info$RNA_Exp[which(plot_rna_info$Subtype%in%c("Group2", "Group4"))])$p.value,4)))
    # p.exp = p.exp + annotate("text", x=2, y=0, label=paste("Groups1 vs Groups2&4   p = ", round(wilcox.test(plot_rna_info$RNA_Exp[which(plot_rna_info$Subtype%in%c("Group1"))], plot_rna_info$RNA_Exp[which(plot_rna_info$Subtype%in%c("Group2", "Group4"))])$p.value,4)))
  } else if (rna_gene=="DLL3"){
    p.exp = p.exp + annotate("text", x=2, y=1, label=paste("Groups1&2 vs Group3   p = ", round(wilcox.test(plot_rna_info$RNA_Exp[which(plot_rna_info$Subtype%in%c("Group1", "Group2"))], plot_rna_info$RNA_Exp[which(plot_rna_info$Subtype%in%c("Group3"))])$p.value,4)))
    p.exp = p.exp + annotate("text", x=2, y=0.5, label=paste("Groups1&2 vs Group4   p = ", round(wilcox.test(plot_rna_info$RNA_Exp[which(plot_rna_info$Subtype%in%c("Group1", "Group2"))], plot_rna_info$RNA_Exp[which(plot_rna_info$Subtype%in%c("Group4"))])$p.value,4)))
     p.exp = p.exp + annotate("text", x=2, y=0, label=paste("Groups1&2 vs Groups3&4   p = ", round(wilcox.test(plot_rna_info$RNA_Exp[which(plot_rna_info$Subtype%in%c("Group1", "Group2"))], plot_rna_info$RNA_Exp[which(plot_rna_info$Subtype%in%c("Group3", "Group4"))])$p.value,4)))
  } else if (rna_gene=="TACSTD2"){
    p.exp = p.exp + annotate("text", x=2, y=0, label=paste("Groups1&2&3 vs Group4   p = ", round(wilcox.test(plot_rna_info$RNA_Exp[which(plot_rna_info$Subtype%in%c("Group1", "Group2", "Group3"))], plot_rna_info$RNA_Exp[which(plot_rna_info$Subtype%in%c("Group4"))])$p.value,4)))
  }
  exp.grob[[rna_gene]] = ggplotGrob(p.exp)
}


```

```{r plot-rnaseq_comparison-plots-for-paper-sez6-tacstd2-dll3-cd276-slfn11-ezh2-kdm1a, fig.height=20, fig.width=18}
gg_rna_lung = list(exp.grob$SLFN11, exp.grob$CD276, exp.grob$SEZ6, exp.grob$DLL3, exp.grob$TACSTD2) # , exp.grob$EZH2, exp.grob$KDM1A
gt = arrangeGrob(grobs=gg_rna_lung, layout_matrix=rbind(c(1, 1, 1, 1, 1, 1, NA, NA, NA, 2, 2, 2, 2, 2, 2),
                                                        c(3, 3, 3, 3, 3, 3, NA, NA, NA, 4, 4, 4, 4, 4, 4),
                                                        c(NA, NA, NA, NA, 5, 5, 5, 5, 5, 5, NA, NA, NA, NA, NA)))
# *************************
# Fig 5 a, b, c, d, e
# *************************
grid.arrange(gt)

```
